creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from "O. Hartmann" <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de> -----

From: "O. Hartmann" <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de>
To: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>

Sorry for the noise! Accidentaly, we had a PREFIX remaining in make.conf 
pointing to another base-dir (apache2). After reinstalling without this 
prefix (I didn't realize that fact) everything gets installed in the 
right place.

Regards
Oliver

----- End forwarded message -----
